meta.title: Frequently asked questions
meta.description: Answers about Vaulto — is my data safe, what it costs, what you can store, and how AI-assisted capture saves you the typing.

hero.heading: Questions, answered plainly.
hero.intro: Straight answers about your data, what it costs, and how Vaulto works. Still curious? Read how we keep it safe or how it works.

items.a: Yes. Your connection is encrypted in transit (TLS), your account database is encrypted at rest, and uploaded files are kept in private storage reachable only through short-lived, signed links. Your password is never stored in plain text, and access is strictly scoped to your account.
items.onward: See how we keep it safe →

items.a: No — never. We don’t sell or share your information for advertising.
Vaulto is free to start. Deeper planning reports are available when you’re ready; you’ll always see what’s included before anything is charged.

items.q: Do I have to enter everything by hand?
items.a: No — upload a photo or document and Vaulto can read it and suggest the details for you.
Families and individuals who want one trusted place to know what they own, keep key documents safe, and plan ahead.
Assets of all kinds — property, accounts, investments, valuables, pensions — plus the documents that go with them.

items.q: Can I use Vaulto in my language?
items.a: The app is available in 16 languages. We’re adding localized site content market by market.

finalCta.title: Ready when you are.
finalCta.body: Start free and add your first few things in minutes.
